plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: MMD Delivery uses your location to show nearby restaurants, set pickup and drop-off points, and help drivers navigate during active deliveries and taxi rides.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: MMD Delivery uses background location during active driver shifts and live trips so clients can track their order or ride until it is completed.

plugins.photosPermission: MMD Delivery accesses your photo library so you can upload profile photos, delivery proof images, and location reference photos.
plugins.cameraPermission: MMD Delivery uses the camera to capture delivery proof photos, location reference photos, and profile pictures.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MMD Delivery uses your location to show nearby restaurants, set pickup and drop-off points, and help drivers navigate during active deliveries and taxi rides.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: MMD Delivery uses background location during active driver shifts and live trips so clients can track their order or ride until it is completed.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: MMD Delivery uses background location during active driver shifts and live trips so clients can track their order or ride until it is completed.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MMD Delivery uses the camera to capture delivery proof photos, location reference photos, and profile pictures.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: MMD Delivery uses the microphone during optional in-ride safety recordings when you choose to start an audio or video safety recording.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MMD Delivery accesses your photo library so you can upload profile photos, delivery proof images, and location reference photos.
